experience.title: Senior Full-stack Engineer — Product & AI

bullets: Increased backend throughput by 50% migrating serial data processing to parallel execution with regulated throttling (Node.js, Redis).

Built analytics dashboards enabling business stakeholders to replace manual reporting with self-serve data exploration.
Accelerated deployments from hours to minutes via CI/CD pipelines and containerized environments (Docker, GitHub Actions).
